label: LinkedIn — Professional Profile Browser
description: Extracted from: joeyism/linkedin_scraper v3 (Playwright), ManiMozaffar/linkedIn-scraper, ed-word/Linkedin-Scraper, ceki-marketing session analysis (158 mentions — most scraped domain). Verified 2026-07-16: 1570px login page ('Войти или зарегистрироваться'). HARD phone-gate — SMS required for registration. OAuth bypass (Google/MS) is THEORETICAL — requires a Google account which itself has phone-gate. Realistically: LinkedIn requires phone. Requires auth for any profile/feed content. Heavy lazy-loading — must scroll full height to trigger all sections.
source_patterns: Profile page: must scroll full height to trigger lazy-loaded sections
Scroll speed: slow, deliberate. 2-4s pause per section (reading)
'See more' buttons on about/experience: click → 2-3s for expand
Connection request: click Connect → 2-3s → Add note → type → 1s → Send
Search results: scroll 1-2s per result, click → 3-5s profile load
Feed: similar to Twitter but slower (professional content, longer reads)

scroll.description: Full profile scroll — sections lazy-load. Source: linkedin_scraper v3

profile_scroll_strategy.description: Must scroll to bottom to trigger all lazy sections. Do NOT jump-to-bottom — scroll incrementally.

login.note: HARD phone-gate. SMS required for registration. OAuth via Google/MS is theoretically possible but requires a Google account — which itself has phone-gate. Realistically: assume phone required. Use existing logged-in sessions when possible (profile export/import).

bypass_strategy.primary: OAuth via Google (Continue with Google) — requires pre-existing Google account
bypass_strategy.alternate: OAuth via Microsoft (Continue with Microsoft) — same constraint
bypass_strategy.reliability: UNRELIABLE — depends on Google/MS account creation without phone, which is IP-dependent lottery
bypass_strategy.recommended_approach: If you already HAVE a Google/MS account: use OAuth. If not: direct phone registration is the only reliable path.

cdp_interaction_pattern.description: LinkedIn is a React SPA. Use Runtime.evaluate with nativeValueSetter for form fields, not Playwright fill().
cdp_interaction_pattern.click_strategy: Use text-content matching for buttons when selectors fail: [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find(e => e.textContent.includes('Connect'))?.click()

rate_limits.connection_requests: ~100/week for new accounts, enforced by 'Connect' button greying out
rate_limits.profile_views: ~100/24h before 'This profile has been viewed by someone in your network' warning

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate linkedin.com → if not logged in: try OAuth (Google/MS) if you have an existing account, else phone registration → navigate profile → scroll top-to-bottom (3 passes, 2-4s pauses) → click 'See more' with text-fallback → scroll again → click Connect/Message via text-content matching → type note → send
